rdf:Description.dc:description: Two-part validation of the distributed BNWF model. (a) Centrifuge pattern check — T2+T3 dry-sand f/f0 bins with ±1σ error bars, model values at the same bins, and the fitted power-law curve f/f0 = 1 + a·(S/D)^b overlaid. (b) Field magnitude check — 32-month Gunsan parked mean f₀ = 0.2400 Hz (±CoV band) vs the model baseline 0.2307 Hz, with the -3.9 % gap annotated.
